name: Ditto
original_name: ระฟ้าหล่นสวรรค์
overview: This is the story of two very different women. One is a promising ballerina, rich and arrogant. The other is a well-mannered flight attendant, always ready with a smile. The two share nothing in common...except for a name. Rafah. Somehow, fate joins them together in a fall from heaven—a flight attendant with a fractured wing and a dancer with a broken leg.

trailers.title: Ditto ระฟ้าหล่นสวรรค์ | GMMTV 2026
